pattern: Reading the digits from the most significant end and flipping a sign after each one accumulates the alternating total in a single pass.
hints: The very first (most significant) digit is always added; every digit after that flips the sign of the one before it.
Split the number into its digits in order from the front, then walk them left to right toggling the sign as you go.
Keep a running total and a sign flag that starts positive and flips after every digit; the final total is the answer.

edge_inputs.description: a four digit number with a negative running total midway
zeros in the middle of the number

stress.description: random values across the full allowed range
